name: Oxabolone cipionate
description: Oxabolone cipionate is the C17β cypionate ester and a prodrug of [DB01500]. A synthetic anabolic-androgenic (AAS) steroid, it is a derivative of 19-nortestosterone (nandrolone). It is considered as a performance enhancing drug thus is prohibited from use in sports.
indication: Used as a performance enhancing drug illicitly in athletes.
pharmacodynamics: Androgenic effects include enhanced secondary sexual characteristics.
